creator: CQG00620@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 184220
An svn diff for japanese/nethack34

(1) japanese/nethack34 fails to build on 12-current due to a different
    function prototype for 'srandom'.
    To fix the problem, include stdlib.h instead of the function prototype.

    This patch is taken from games/nethack34.  Thanks!

(2) Take maintainership.
